query: SELECT w.slug, w.title, w.shortDescription, w.location, w.duration, w.ticketPrice/100 as priceRupees, wd.sessionDate, wd.startTime, wd.endTime, wd.maxCapacity, wd.bookedCount FROM workshops w LEFT JOIN workshop_dates wd ON w.id = wd.workshopId WHERE w.status = 'published' ORDER BY wd.sessionDate;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT w.slug, w.title, w.shortDescription, w.location, w.duration, w.ticketPrice/100 as priceRupees, wd.sessionDate, wd.startTime, wd.endTime, wd.maxCapacity, wd.bookedCount FROM workshops w LEFT JOIN workshop_dates wd ON w.id = wd.workshopId WHERE w.status = 'published' ORDER BY wd.sessionDate;
